title: fragaria vesca var. viridis
intro: Fragaria vesca var. viridis is a lesser-known variety of wild strawberry plant, which is a type of low-growing, perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. viridis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, anxiety, and other health conditions.
